title: SPARTA Strategy Factory v1 - Hygiene Bundle H1-H2
scope: Hygiene foundation only: H1 (isolated factory-research worktree) and H2 (commit-guard). No strategy research execution, no backtest, no IS/OOS, no data fetch, no broker/live/paper, no exchange API, no strategy-logic mutation. Safety tooling + tests + docs only.

loose_end.action: left untouched - committing them is a separate, separately-authorized action on that branch, out of scope here

standing_worktree_rules: Future factory/crypto research runs in C:/sparta-factory-research
master / JARVIS continue independently in C:/SPARTA_BRAIN
Explicit-pathspec commits only; never git add . / git add <dir>
No merge / rebase / push without explicit approval
Preflight each turn on the worktree's own HEAD

h2_commit_guard.why_json_rules_file: The factory safety-guard source scanner (tests/test_safety_guards.py) scans every .py except tests/ for forbidden vendor/credential substrings. Storing deny-patterns in commit_guard_rules.json (not a .py, not scanned) keeps commit_guard.py token-clean and compatible with the offline/inert safety contract.
h2_commit_guard.why_cli_not_hook: Git hooks live in the shared common .git dir and would apply to BOTH worktrees, imposing factory rules on the concurrent JARVIS/master workstream. An opt-in CLI check (optionally wired as a hook inside the factory worktree only) gives protection without that blast radius.

no_files_touched: No engine, strategy, config, data, JARVIS, broker, or live/paper file was created or modified. No worktree was created or destroyed.
next_allowed_step: Begin the Orchestration block (Bundle 001 Block O: validation_runner + validation_gates + candidate registry + hypothesis queue + safe registration + manual-start overnight batch), performed in the isolated worktree, with the commit-guard wired in. Separately authorized.
trading_recommendation: NONE. Hygiene/tooling bundle only. All 8 strategy branches remain PARKED; no active strategy; no paper/live system exists or is authorized; OOS remains sealed; no strategy logic was touched.
